SELECT * FROM t_null WHERE y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_null WHERE y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT y, y IS NOT NULL AS is_not_null FROM t_null;
SELECT t_null.y, t_other.z FROM t_null JOIN t_other ON t_null.y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_null WHERE y IS NOT NULL) AS not_null_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_other WHERE z IS NOT NULL) AS not_null_count_other;
SELECT DISTINCT t_null.y FROM t_null WHERE t_null.y IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT t_other.z FROM t_other WHERE t_other.z IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT y IS NOT NULL AS is_not_null FROM t_null) AS subquery WHERE is_not_null = 1;
